title: wedelia leucanthema
intro: Wedelia leucanthema, also known as the yellow flower or wild plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia leucanthema include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive problems, and alleviate symptoms of cold and flu. The herbal preparations of Wedelia leucanthema include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
